title: setiacis diffusa
intro: Setiacis diffusa, commonly known as the sida or country mallow, is a plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting immune function. Sida is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
